title: Heel wore out, sole separated, no longer waterproof after 5 months
body: Bought a pair of the everyday classics. After 3 months the material on the heel started to wear out and created a hole. After 5 months the sole started to separate from the shoe and they were no longer waterproof. The company would do nothing for me except offer 15% off a new pair. For the price, the quality is definitely not there.

title: Three weeks since return received, no refund, multiple follow-ups ignored
body: Worst customer service I have ever dealt with. Sent my shoes back for a refund and it's been three weeks since they received my return and I still haven't gotten my money back. I have reached out to them numerous times and they just kept saying it was processed when it wasn't. Don't waste your time or money on this company. I really wanted to like them, but with a customer service department like this, it's not worth it.

title: No support, flat insole like cardboard, not for wide feet
body: Uncomfortable, no support whatsoever, and not for wide feet. I sized up as recommended but my foot was still super squished. The insole is completely flat and feels like you're walking on cardboard. After wearing them for a day of errands, my feet were aching. Definitely not the 'all-day' comfort they advertise.
personas: The Bunion & Structural Foot Problem Buyer

title: Tread separating on both shoes after less than a year
body: I have had these shoes for less than a year. Within the past two months the tread on the bottom of the shoe started separating from the rest of the shoe. I used shoe goo to glue them back together as I assumed it was from me wearing them so often. Now the other shoe is doing the same thing. I have never had a pair of shoes do this before, let alone a pair that costs over $100. I am extremely disappointed in the quality of these shoes.

title: Zero breathability, feet soaked in sweat
body: They are waterproof, but at a huge cost. There is ZERO breathability. It's like wearing a plastic bag on your feet. My feet have never sweat so much in a pair of sneakers. After a few hours, the inside is damp from sweat, which completely defeats the purpose of them being 'waterproof' from the outside. Unwearable for a full day.

title: Light grey got dirty first day, impossible to clean
body: The light grey colour got dirty on the first day and it's impossible to clean. I've tried everything, but the knit material just holds onto dirt and stains. They looked old and grubby after just a week of normal city walking. The 'easy to clean' claim is a joke. Very disappointed with how they've held up aesthetically.

title: Inside heel fabric worn away, rubbing heels raw after a few months
body: After only a few months of very casual wear (walking my dog, going to the grocery store) the inside heel fabric on both shoes has completely worn away, creating uncomfortable holes that rub my heels raw. For a $135 shoe, I expect it to last longer than 4-5 months before falling apart. The waterproof feature is useless if the shoe itself disintegrates.

title: Dangerously slippery on wet surfaces, slipped multiple times
body: These shoes are advertised for rain, but they are dangerously slippery on any wet, smooth surface. Pavement is fine, but walking on wet tile, manhole covers, or smooth concrete is like walking on ice. I've slipped multiple times. It's a major design flaw for a shoe that's meant to be worn in wet conditions. The tread provides almost no grip.
personas: The Chronic Joint & Swelling Condition Buyer
